content.verdict: Riu Palace Santa Maria is the premium all-inclusive RIU property on Sal — a adults-oriented palace hotel on Santa Maria beach with RIU's reliably high European service standards, multiple pools, good beach access, and all-inclusive dining and drinks included. For couples who want a guaranteed no-surprises beach holiday at an accessible price, Riu Palace delivers consistent quality in one of the Atlantic's sunniest destinations.
content.best_room: The Junior Suite Swim-Up is the best choice for honeymooners at Riu Palace — a ground-floor suite with direct access from the private terrace into a quiet swim-up pool, giving couples a semi-private outdoor water space in addition to the hotel's main pools. Junior Suites on the upper floors with sea view are excellent alternatives for the best ocean panoramas from the balcony.

itinerary_7_nights.title: All-Inclusive Arrival
itinerary_7_nights.description: Transfer from Sal Airport (15 minutes) to Riu Palace Santa Maria. The all-inclusive model means nothing to think about — drinks, meals, and beach service are all included from the moment of check-in. Head to the pool bar, explore the beach, and begin the relaxation immediately. Dinner at one of Riu's three restaurant options.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Santa Maria Beach Day
itinerary_7_nights.description: The Riu Palace beach area on Santa Maria's famous 8-km strip is well-organized with sun loungers and beach service included. Spend the morning swimming in the clear turquoise Atlantic, try paddleboarding (included in the activity program), and use the afternoon for a snorkeling excursion over the nearby reef. Evening entertainment at the resort.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Spa & Pool Day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Book a couples massage at the Renova Spa — the one thing not included in the all-inclusive rate but worth the supplement. Afternoon at the hotel's pools, including the calmer adults-oriented pool area. Sunset cocktails at the sea-view bar with Santa Maria's turquoise water in the background.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Pedra de Lume Salt Lake
itinerary_7_nights.description: An easy half-day excursion from the hotel to the Pedra de Lume volcanic crater salt lake, where the hypersaline water makes floating effortless. The pink-tinged salt flats and volcanic crater walls are among Sal's most distinctive landscapes. Return for lunch at the hotel's beach grill — all included.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Kitesurfing Lesson
itinerary_7_nights.description: Santa Maria is one of the world's top kitesurfing destinations — the reliable trade winds and shallow flat water make it ideal for beginners. Book a lesson with the beach schools adjacent to the hotel. Even if kitesurfing is not normally your interest, an introductory lesson on these perfect conditions is exhilarating.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Fishing Trip & Local Dinner
itinerary_7_nights.description: A morning deep-sea fishing trip off Sal's coast targets yellowfin tuna, barracuda, and wahoo in the rich Atlantic waters. Return to the hotel for lunch. In the evening, escape the all-inclusive bubble for a local dinner in Santa Maria town at one of the village's catch-of-the-day seafood restaurants — a worthwhile contrast.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Final Beach Morning
itinerary_7_nights.description: Last morning on the beach with Atlantic coffee and a slow checkout. Riu Palace has streamlined airport transfers for all-inclusive guests — the 15-minute drive to Sal airport is one of the shortest airport transfers of any beach destination in the world.

caveats: Riu Palace is a large chain hotel — it lacks the boutique character of Tortuga Beach Resort. The all-inclusive model is excellent for budget certainty but the food quality and variety are at standard European all-inclusive level rather than fine dining.
Santa Maria's tourist strip can feel generic rather than culturally Cape Verdean. Couples who want authentic local experiences need to venture beyond the resort zone.
The consistent trade winds are an asset for water sports but can make beach relaxation less comfortable on windier days — typically December through March.

faqs.question: Is Riu Palace Santa Maria good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Yes, as an accessible, reliable, and good-value beach honeymoon. The all-inclusive format eliminates budget anxiety, Santa Maria's beach is genuinely beautiful, and the swim-up pool suites add a romantic touch. It is the best choice for couples prioritizing value and simplicity in a warm Atlantic destination.

faqs.question: What is the best time to visit?
faqs.answer: November through June for consistent sunshine and the best beach conditions. December through February is peak season with great weather and the most lively Santa Maria atmosphere. July and August are warmer but less windy — good for swimming but not for kitesurfing.

faqs.question: How far in advance should you book?
faqs.answer: Book 6–8 weeks ahead for most dates; 2–3 months for peak holiday periods (Christmas, New Year, February). Riu Palace has more rooms than boutique hotels and availability is generally good.

faqs.question: Is Riu Palace adults-only?
faqs.answer: No, though the Palace properties in the RIU group tend to have a more sophisticated, couples-oriented atmosphere compared to the standard RIU Hotels. Children are welcome but the Palace category attracts more adult couples.

faqs.question: What is the best room type?
faqs.answer: Junior Suite Swim-Up for the private pool access that adds real romance. Junior Suite with Sea View on the upper floors for the best Atlantic panoramas from the balcony.

faqs.question: How do you get to Riu Palace Santa Maria?
faqs.answer: Fly into Sal's Amílcar Cabral International Airport (SID) — direct flights from the UK, Germany, Portugal, Netherlands, and other European hubs. Transfer to the hotel takes 15 minutes. RIU arranges transfers for all-inclusive guests.
